timeline.summary: Adverse media: SEBI restrains subject in front-running probe.
PAN exact-match to an active NSE/SEBI debarment. Gate fired.
SAR drafted. Citation coverage 96%. 2 claims excluded as unverifiable.

sections.subject_identification: The subject is Dipak Dwiwedi (PAN ATDPD4055C), an individual customer onboarded 2021-03-14 with a current exposure of INR 4.82 crore [EV-001].
sections.basis_for_suspicion: The subject's PAN exactly matches an active debarment order on the NSE/SEBI debarred entities register [EV-001]. Independent adverse media reports the same regulatory action [EV-002]. The match was established on an exact identifier and did not rely on name similarity.
sections.chronology_of_events: 2023-03-02: SEBI order issued against the subject [EV-001]. 2026-07-13: adverse media reported the restraint [EV-002]. 2026-07-13: risk tier escalated NONE -> HIGH.
sections.evidence_summary: CONFIRMED: PAN-level match to an active NSE/SEBI debarment [EV-001]; corroborating adverse media [EV-002]. MISSING: directorship history could not be retrieved from the MCA registry [EV-003] and has been excluded.
sections.risk_assessment: Tier HIGH. Gate DEBARRED_PAN_EXACT_ACTIVE fired on a deterministic identifier match (entity-resolution confidence 1.00) [EV-001]. Soft score 0.71.
sections.recommended_action: Escalate for compliance review. Recommend restriction of securities-related activity pending confirmation. Human sign-off required before filing.

evidence.claim: PAN ATDPD4055C exactly matches an active NSE/SEBI debarment order.
evidence.excerpt: Order Particulars: SEBI Interim Order in the matter of Stock Recommendations using YouTube in the scrip of Sadhna Broadcast Limited

evidence.claim: Adverse media reports the subject was restrained by SEBI in a front-running probe.
evidence.excerpt: The regulator has restrained the subject from accessing the securities market.

evidence.claim: Directorship history could not be retrieved; MCA registry lookup returned no record.

unverified_claims: The subject holds a directorship in a listed entity. — EXCLUDED: no MCA registry record was retrievable. This claim has been removed from the report.
The subject is associated with the entity named in the related SEBI order. — EXCLUDED: co-accused linkage could not be confirmed at identifier level.

reviewer_actions.note: Need MCA directorship confirmation before I sign off on the SAR.

timeline.summary: PAN exact-match to an active NSE/SEBI debarment.
NSE revoked the debarment order. Risk DE-ESCALATED.
NIA chargesheet names a transliteration of a UAPA-designated individual.
UAPA gate fired. No identifier confirmation possible on either side.
Escalated to MLRO. Auto-decision withheld in both directions by design.
Name matched a debarred entity; PANs differ. Suppressed automatically.

reviewer_actions.note: Correct suppression. Confirmed distinct person. Adding a suppression rule so this pair never re-alerts.
